Notice Of Motion For Defualt Judgment Prove Up

Notice Of Motion For Defualt Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Continued To Mar-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Blanca M. Ramos and Gerardo Abdiel Ramos.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:26 a.m.

David Chen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff TD Auto Finance LLC.
Elizabeth Boteler, Loss Mitigation Specialist III and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Chen and Ms. Boteler appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Blanca M. Ramos or Gerardo Abdiel Ramos

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed March 15, 2021, and personally served on defendant Gerardo Abdiel Ramos on May 2, 2021.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Blanca M. Ramos occurred on April 12, 2021, and was effectuated on April 22, 2021.
Default as to both defendants was entered on July 2, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 2, 2021.

Plaintiff TD Auto Finance LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Contract for the purchase of the automobile in question....................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Payment History............................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Deficiency Memorandum......................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court issues a TENTATIVE RULING in favor of Plaintiff TD Auto Finance LLC, and against the defaulted defendants Blanca M. Ramos and Gerardo Abdiel Ramos, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,310.89.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,828.95.
Attorney Fees - To Be Determined ($3,431.09 requested by counsel)
Costs - $646.00.

Total - $43,216.93. (Tentitive Amount)

Matter is CONTINUED to March 3, 2022 for further default prove-up on the sole issue of plaintiff's request for attorney fees. If the Court is satisfied with the documentation submitted by counsel in support of the requested attorney fees, judgment shall be entered and the matter shall be taken off calendar. If not, counsel shall appear on March 3rd, but the witness's appearance is waived.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:41 a.m.
